label: Checkbox
summary: The 13×13 sunken checkbox with a proper check glyph.
era: Windows 95's 13-by-13 checkbox, the exact square you ticked to join a mailing list forever.

classes.name: rs-checkbox
classes.role: restyled native checkbox: 13×13 sunken box, black check glyph

a11y: Under the pixel paint sits the native input, keyboard toggling and screen-reader states are untouched, and the dotted focus ring lands on the label. Always wire the <label for>.
